creator: dfilter@FreeBSD.ORG
text:
Author: miwi
Date: Mon Feb  4 14:31:17 2013
New Revision: 311622
URL: http://svnweb.freebsd.org/changeset/ports/311622

Log:
  - Update MASTER_SITES
  - Fix build with clang
  - Add MAKE_JOBS_SAFE
  
  PR:		175570
  Submitted by:	Ports Fury

Modified:
  head/audio/xcdplayer/Makefile   (contents, props changed)
  head/audio/xcdplayer/files/patch-internals.c   (contents, props changed)

Modified: head/audio/xcdplayer/Makefile
==============================================================================
--- head/audio/xcdplayer/Makefile	Mon Feb  4 14:30:02 2013	(r311621)
+++ head/audio/xcdplayer/Makefile	Mon Feb  4 14:31:17 2013	(r311622)
@@ -1,22 +1,20 @@
-# New ports collection makefile for:    xcdplayer
-# Date created:		30 Sep 1994
-# Whom:			swallace
-#
+# Created by: swallace
 # $FreeBSD$
-#
 
 PORTNAME=	xcdplayer
 PORTVERSION=	2.2
 PORTREVISION=	3
 CATEGORIES=	audio
-MASTER_SITES=	ftp://ftp.x.org/R5contrib/
+MASTER_SITES=	XCONTRIB/../R5contrib
 EXTRACT_SUFX=	.tar.Z
 
 MAINTAINER=	ports@FreeBSD.org
 COMMENT=	CD player for X
 
-USE_IMAKE=	yes
 USE_XORG=	xbitmaps xaw
+USE_IMAKE=	yes
+MAKE_JOBS_SAFE=	yes
+
 MAN1=		xcdplayer.1
 
 PLIST_FILES=	bin/xcdplayer lib/X11/app-defaults/XCdplayer

Modified: head/audio/xcdplayer/files/patch-internals.c
==============================================================================
--- head/audio/xcdplayer/files/patch-internals.c	Mon Feb  4 14:30:02 2013	(r311621)
+++ head/audio/xcdplayer/files/patch-internals.c	Mon Feb  4 14:31:17 2013	(r311622)
@@ -26,6 +26,24 @@
  
  int
  cdrom_get_curtime() {
+@@ -46,7 +50,7 @@
+ 
+ 	if (cdrom_open() == -1) {
+ 		debug_printf(1, "cdrom_get_curtime: error from cdrom_open\n");
+-		return;
++		return 0;
+ 	}
+ 
+ 	switch (cdrom_status()) {
+@@ -54,7 +58,7 @@
+ 	case CDROM_PLAYING:
+ 	    if (cdrom_get_curmsf(&curmsf) == -1) {
+ 		debug_printf(1, "get_curtime: error reading location\n");
+-		return;
++		return 0;
+ 	    }
+ 
+ 	    if (((curtrack = cdrom_get_curtrack()) == -1) ||
 @@ -76,6 +80,7 @@
  	}
  }
